validation_command: python -c "import json,pathlib; oapi_path=pathlib.Path('Hb Track - Backend/docs/ssot/openapi.json'); assert oapi_path.exists(),'FAIL: openapi.json nao encontrado em Hb Track - Backend/docs/ssot/'; d=json.loads(oapi_path.read_bytes().decode('utf-8')); paths=list(d.get('paths',{}).keys()); assert len(paths)>=200,f'FAIL: openapi.json tem {len(paths)} paths, esperado >= 200'; assert '/api/v1/athletes' in paths,'FAIL: /api/v1/athletes ausente no openapi.json'; assert '/api/v1/attendance/{attendance_id}' in paths,'FAIL: /api/v1/attendance/{{attendance_id}} ausente'; assert d.get('info',{}).get('version'),'FAIL: info.version nao declarado no openapi.json'; print(f'PASS AR_060: openapi.json valido — {len(paths)} paths, info.version={d[\"info\"][\"version\"]}')"
